name: understanding-michael-porter-the-essential-guide-to-competition-and-strategy
description: Joan Magretta's guide to Michael Porter's frameworks for competition and strategy — Five Forces, value chain, trade-offs, and competitive advantage.
useCase: Understand industry competition through Five Forces, build competitive advantage, and develop sustainable strategy through trade-offs and fit.
knownRisks: Porter's frameworks may oversimplify complex market dynamics
Long-term strategy can be disrupted by technological change
Some criticize Porter's work for being too static
